name: Ris Fralmoton
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial male. Wears green felt linens, a collared shirt, and thick cowhide shoes - practical clothing for someone working with horses.
Race: Imperial
Personality Keywords: industrious, entrepreneurial, practical
Role: Ris Fralmoton is an ostler who was intended to operate a horse-selling business called "Bit and Bridle" in the Imperial City Market District, presumably from the location that became Red Diamond Jewelry.
Home Location Information: The intended location of Bit and Bridle in the Market District, where he would have both lived and worked.
Daily Routine: Ris would have slept from midnight to 6am, then spent most of his day wandering around his establishment, available to customers seeking to purchase horses. He would have taken meals from midday to 2pm and again from 6pm to 8pm, with the rest of his time dedicated to his business.
Personality - The Absent Merchant: Ris was intended to be a practical businessman offering horses for sale to the citizens and visitors of the Imperial City. His simple routine and modest possessions suggest someone focused on running a straightforward, honest business serving those in need of mounts.
author: Bethesda
